issues: boots sprite appears at ~75-80% of player height, pushing upper bound of 50-75% item rule
item display box on left fills nearly full box area, slightly oversized for diorama item showcase
reasoning: The composite scene shows a top-down dungeon layout with player sprite (~32x32). The boots_speed_v02 item is composited both in a left-side display box and as world sprites flanking the player. In-world, the boots reach roughly 75-80% of player height — technically within marginal tolerance but nudging past the 75% ceiling for armor/item category. The display box showcase (left side) also renders the boots quite large relative to the box frame. Perspective is consistent with the scene's top-down style; no wallpaper zoom-out issue. The toy-diorama feel is mostly intact. No gross violations (item is not larger than player), but size is at the loose edge of the spec, warranting a marginal rather than pass.
